description: Enum-subset refinement — dead arm via the notIn form (§53.15). @role is typed Role notIn([.Guest]), so .Guest is EXCLUDED from the value's variant set. A match arm for .Guest is dead and fires E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM (the §34 error partition). The notIn([...]) twin of refinement-subset-dead-arm-pos (which uses oneOf([...])).
rationale: §53.15.1 notIn([.Guest]) narrows the variant set to exclude .Guest; a match arm naming the excluded .Guest is dead -> E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM.
